CREATE TABLE angles (id INT PRIMARY KEY, angle FLOAT);
SELECT cos(angle) FROM angles WHERE angle < 0;
SELECT cos(angle) FROM angles WHERE angle BETWEEN 0 AND 6.28318;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT id, cos(angle) AS cosine_result FROM angles;
SELECT a.id, a.angle, r.cosine_result FROM angles a INNER JOIN results r ON a.id = r.id WHERE r.cosine_result > 0;
SELECT cos(angle + (SELECT MAX(angle) FROM angles)) FROM angles;
WITH angle_data AS (SELECT angle FROM angles WHERE angle < 10) SELECT cos(angle) FROM angle_data;
SELECT a.id, a.angle, cos(a.angle) AS cosine_value FROM angles a LEFT JOIN results r ON a.id = r.id WHERE r.cosine_result IS NOT NULL;
SELECT cos(CAST(angle AS DOUBLE)) FROM angles WHERE angle > 5;
SELECT id, angle, CASE WHEN cos(angle) > 0 THEN 'Positive' ELSE 'Non-positive' END AS sign FROM angles;
